title: Rhyse Martin
description: Papua New Guinea international rugby league footballer (born 1993)
extract:
Rhyse Martin (born 1 March 1993) is a Papua New Guinea international rugby league footballer who plays as a second-row forward for Hull Kingston Rovers in the Betfred Super League. 
He previously played for the Leeds Rhinos in the Super League and the Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs in the NRL, as well as captaining Papua New Guinea at international level.
